title: Word Formation: Why We Need Sleep

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
We spend about a third of our lives asleep, which shows just how great the 1.1. _________ of rest really is. For many years 1.2. _________ have studied what happens to the body during the night. They have discovered that deep sleep is the time when most of a child's 1.3. _________ takes place.

Sleep also helps the mind. Pupils who rest well find that their 1.4. _________ in class improves, and they remember their lessons far better. By contrast, anyone who has had too little sleep soon begins to feel 1.5. _________ and irritable. Driving while exhausted can even be extremely 1.6. _________.

The good news is that good sleep is easy to build. Doctors recommend going to bed at a 1.7. _________ time and avoiding screens late in the evening. A 1.8. _________ routine, repeated every night, is one of the simplest ways to protect both body and mind.
